hero.label: Hero Banner Section
hero.description: H1 headline + subheadline + checkmark trust points + dual CTA (lime + outline) + image placeholder + breadcrumb + logo strip

variants.layout: Split 55/45 — text left with checkmarks, image right, logo strip below
variants.best_for: Standard consulting service pages needing visual context

stats.label: Stats / Trust Numbers Section
stats.description: 4 stat cards showing key metrics with lime accent bars, white numbers + lime symbols (+, %)

variants.layout: 4-column navy card grid on light background
variants.best_for: Standard stats section directly below hero

variants.layout: Left heading (32%) + right 2x2 icon card grid (64%)
variants.best_for: When stats need narrative context and editorial heading

problem_statement.label: Problem Statement / Challenges Section
problem_statement.description: Key challenges the service addresses, with red visual indicators for urgency

variants.layout: 3x2 white cards with red left accent border, red icons, no numbers
variants.best_for: Clean scannable problem framing on white background

variants.layout: Left sticky image (42%) + right pain point list (55%) with stat card below image
variants.best_for: Visual storytelling with human image alongside pain points

services.label: Key Services / Interactive Services Section
services.description: Clickable service list with rotating detail cards or expanding panels

variants.layout: Left sidebar nav + right rotating white card on navy background
variants.best_for: Reference-style carousel matching competitor patterns

variants.layout: Horizontal pill tabs + expanding detail panel with image area below
variants.best_for: Detailed service exploration with visual and feature list

sub_services.label: Sub-Services / Service Cards with Images Section
sub_services.description: 3x2 service cards with images, hover zoom effect, and linking capability

variants.layout: 3-column (3x2) image cards with lime left accent bar
variants.best_for: Standard image card grid for linking to individual service pages

service_detail.label: Service Detail / Expanded Explanation Section
service_detail.description: Deep-dive into service capabilities with sub-features, images, and interactive elements

variants.layout: Alternating image+text blocks with 3-column sub-features row below each
variants.best_for: Detailed capability breakdown with image context per block

variants.layout: Accordion blocks — click to expand image + description + bullet sub-features
variants.best_for: Compact pages with 3+ capability areas, interactive exploration

differentiators.label: Why Edstellar / Key Differentiators Section
differentiators.description: Value propositions and competitive differentiators with image and accent bars

variants.layout: Left image + heading (42%) with right differentiator list (54%)
variants.best_for: Split layout matching Capgemini/consultant reference pattern

process.label: Process / Methodology Section
process.description: Numbered steps showing how Edstellar delivers consulting engagements, with duration badges and delivery-format tags

variants.layout: 5 numbered circles on horizontal connecting line, content below each step
variants.best_for: Standard process overview on light background, visual left-to-right flow

variants.layout: Navy background, left vertical line with numbered markers, card per step
variants.best_for: Premium dark section, detailed process with ample content per step

variants.layout: 3+2 white card grid — click any step to expand details
features: large faded numbers (turn lime on active)
variants.best_for: Interactive exploration, compact pages, light background

industries.label: Industries We Serve Section
industries.description: Grid or tile layout showing industries Edstellar serves, with icons and short descriptions

variants.layout: 3x3 centered icon card grid on white background
features: card lift + lime border on hover
variants.best_for: Clean scannable grid on white/light background

variants.layout: Navy background — left heading with stat card, right 2-col icon tags
variants.best_for: Premium dark section with trust stat, pairs well after light sections

variants.layout: Horizontal pill tiles — click to show detail panel with features + 4 mini stat cards
variants.best_for: Maximum detail per industry, interactive exploration, most content-rich

connected_services.label: Connected / Related Services Section
connected_services.description: Cross-sell strip linking to other consulting service pages with icons, titles, descriptions, and arrow CTAs

variants.layout: 3-column white cards on light background with icon, title, description, arrow CTA
variants.best_for: Standard cross-sell section on light background

variants.layout: Navy background with horizontally scrollable cards + arrow navigation
variants.best_for: Showing 4-5+ connected services without vertical space, dark section

variants.layout: Minimal single-row with 3 icon+text columns, dividers, and view-all link
features: view all consulting services footer link
variants.best_for: Near-footer cross-sell, minimal vertical space, light background

download_asset.label: Download Asset / Free Resource Section
download_asset.description: CTA section for downloadable templates, frameworks, or guides

variants.layout: Left asset preview card + right heading and text with CTA
variants.best_for: Clean split layout on light background

variants.layout: Single navy card with left text + right asset preview inset
variants.best_for: Compact self-contained drop-in section, navy background

success_stories.label: Success Stories / Case Studies Section
success_stories.description: Client results with quote, stats, image, and carousel navigation

variants.layout: Light background — split image + quote with stats row, arrow carousel
variants.best_for: Light background pages, matches Edstellar reference pattern

variants.layout: Navy card with image left + quote/stats right, numbered nav below
variants.best_for: Premium enclosed feel, dark background variation

testimonials.label: Client Testimonials / Quote Section
testimonials.description: Client quotes with avatar thumbnail and carousel navigation

variants.layout: Left heading + description with arrows, right quote card carousel
features: navy arrow buttons (prev faded, next full)
variants.best_for: Standard testimonial section with user thumbnail

faq.label: FAQ / Frequently Asked Questions Section
faq.description: Accordion-style FAQ with expand/collapse, navy/lime bottom borders

variants.layout: Centered heading + accordion list with navy bottom borders turning lime when active
features: navy border turns lime on active
variants.best_for: Standard FAQ section matching Edstellar reference

resources.label: Resources / Blog Cards Section
resources.description: 3-column blog/resource cards with images and hover zoom

variants.layout: 3-column blog cards with image zoom on hover
variants.best_for: Standard resources section matching Edstellar reference

form.label: Lead Capture / Consultation Form Section
form.description: Contact form with left image and right form panel

variants.layout: Left image (45%) + right form panel (55%) in rounded card
features: dropdowns for company size and L&D challenge
variants.best_for: Standard lead capture form matching Edstellar reference

ranked_leaderboard.label: Ranked Leaderboard / Volume Table Section
ranked_leaderboard.description: Numbered ranked list showing service categories with delivery volume counts, NEW badges, and hover effects on navy background

variants.layout: Navy background — split heading + numbered row list with volume counts
variants.best_for: Showing ranked service categories, assessment types, or program popularity with volume data

closed_loop_cycle.label: Closed-Loop Cycle / Process Model Section
closed_loop_cycle.description: 4-step circular process model with connecting line, numbered navy circles, and a differentiator callout card

variants.layout: White background — centered heading, 4-step connected cycle, navy callout card
variants.best_for: Cyclical process models (diagnose-develop, plan-do-check-act), differentiator messaging

definitional_intro.label: Definitional Intro Section
definitional_intro.description: Centered narrow-width section with label, H2 heading, and 2-paragraph body text with lime left accent bar on lead paragraph

variants.layout: Centered narrow container (820px) with label + H2 + 2 paragraphs
features: lime left accent bar on lead paragraph
variants.best_for: Definitional sections explaining what a consulting service is

benefit_pillars.label: Benefit Pillars / Why Work With Section
benefit_pillars.description: Navy background section with numbered 4-column benefit cards explaining why enterprises choose Edstellar

variants.layout: 4-column numbered card grid on navy background
variants.best_for: Value proposition sections with 4 benefit pillars on dark background

three_pillars.label: Three Pillars / What We Do Section
three_pillars.description: 3-column card grid with lime top accent bars, icons, and descriptions on light background

variants.layout: Centered heading + 3-column card grid with lime accent bars and icons
features: lime top accent bar per card
variants.best_for: Concise 3-pillar intro explaining focus areas of a consulting service

logo_wall.label: Client Logo Wall / Brand Grid Section
logo_wall.description: Navy background section with flowing grid of brand name tags as social proof

variants.layout: Centered heading + flex-wrap grid of brand name tags on navy background
variants.best_for: Displaying 20+ client brand names as social proof without logo images

cta_banner.label: CTA Banner Section
cta_banner.description: Full-width lime background CTA strip with heading, description, and navy button

variants.layout: Centered heading + description + navy CTA button on lime background
variants.best_for: Conversion-focused CTA strip between content sections

footer.label: Site Footer Section
footer.description: Centered footer with ISO certifications, legal links, social icons, and copyright on dark navy background

variants.layout: Centered footer with certs, legal links, social icons, and copyright
variants.best_for: Standard site footer for all consulting pages

seo_metadata.label: SEO Metadata Block
seo_metadata.description: NOT a visual section — developer handoff template for <head> metadata including meta title, description, OG tags, Twitter cards, Schema.org markup, and deployment checklist

variants.best_for: Pass to development team for every consulting page — fill in per-page values

services_grid_12.label: Services Grid / 12-Column Card Layout Section
services_grid_12.description: 4x3 card grid with lime top accent bars, unique SVG icons per service, descriptions, and Learn More links on white background

variants.layout: Centered heading + 4-column (4x3) card grid with lime accent bars and icons
features: lime top accent bar per card
variants.best_for: Large service listing pages with 10-12+ individual services

content_formats_list.label: Content Formats / 2-Column Numbered List Section
content_formats_list.description: Split-header layout with 2-column numbered format rows showing content types and short descriptions on light background

variants.layout: Split heading (45%/52%) + 2-column numbered row list with total count badge
variants.best_for: Displaying 10-14+ content types, format lists, or capability inventories

ai_powered_split.label: AI-Powered / Feature Split Section
ai_powered_split.description: Navy background split layout with editorial text left and numbered capability cards right

variants.layout: Navy background — left heading + paragraphs + CTA (52%), right numbered capability cards (44%)
variants.best_for: Technology differentiator sections, AI/automation capabilities, innovation features

transformation_phases.label: Transformation / Phase Comparison Cards Section
transformation_phases.description: 4-column card grid showing before/after transformation phases with Problem (red), Solution (navy), and Outcome (lime) tri-colour accent system

variants.layout: Centered heading + 4-column cards with stacked Problem/Solution/Outcome blocks
variants.best_for: Before/after comparisons, transformation journeys, impact demonstrations

outcomes_deliverables.label: Outcomes & Deliverables / Horizontal Tabs Section
outcomes_deliverables.description: Horizontal tabbed section with split layout — left text with checkmark list, right navy panel with rich embedded HTML visuals (heatmaps, stacked bars, bubble charts, pyramids, donut charts, roadmap timelines)

variants.layout: Numbered horizontal tabs + split panel (text left, navy rich-embed visual right)
features: rich HTML embeds (heatmap, stacked bars, bubble chart, pyramid, donut, roadmap)
variants.best_for: Outcomes and deliverables sections with rich interactive data visualizations per tab
